title: Eat Move Sleep
author: Tom Rath
subline: How small choices lead to big changes.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Three columns labeled EAT / MOVE / SLEEP, each a vertical bar chart of habit. The MOVE column has the tallest bar in RED (the one we neglect). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Column 1: EAT -->
    <g transform="translate(-460 0)">
      <line x1="0" y1="-300" x2="0" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="-30" y="-160" width="60" height="160" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.4"/>
      <text x="0" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#cccccc">EAT</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Column 2: MOVE — the short bar in red (we don't move enough) -->
    <g transform="translate(0 0)">
      <line x1="0" y1="-300" x2="0" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="-30" y="-80" width="60" height="80" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="0" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#cccccc">MOVE</text>
      <text x="0" y="-100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#fc1c46">↓ LOW</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Column 3: SLEEP -->
    <g transform="translate(460 0)">
      <line x1="0" y1="-300" x2="0" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="-30" y="-200" width="60" height="200" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.4"/>
      <text x="0" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#cccccc">SLEEP</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Three columns at the bottom of the canvas: EAT, MOVE, SLEEP. The MOVE column is the short one — bar in red, marked 'LOW.' The book's argument: we eat, we sleep, we just don't move. 320px uppercase command-weight title sits at the top. The single red is the missing movement.
